diagnostic: The delay is rarely in shipping — it is in a bottleneck upstream that your MES is not configured to flag. A Goldratt agent reads the MES flow holistically and identifies the constraint your standard reports miss.
answer: The delay is rarely in shipping — it is in a bottleneck upstream that your MES is not configured to flag. A Goldratt agent reads the MES flow holistically and identifies the constraint your standard reports miss.
description: Brittle integration — as systems become more automated, they become more fragile. Geopolitical volatility compresses planning horizons to 48 hours.
symptom: One tariff change disrupts the quarter. One API outage stops the factory. The CEO no longer understands how their own company works.
